overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a trench coat walking through a modern London-inspired cityscape. The character moves from a covered urban underpass onto rain-slicked streets with autumn foliage, ascending stairs to a plaza occupied by a protest encampment featuring green tents and activist signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian walkway beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the road to the left
pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction under the overpass

entered.detail: concrete underside of highway overpass with embedded lighting fixtures
smooth concrete wall with red accent panels running along the right side
multi-lane asphalt road with yellow double lines and white markings
short black metal bollards separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered urban walkway beneath a highway overpass. The environment is dimly lit with artificial ceiling lights mixed with natural light from the distant exit. Vehicles pass on the road to the left while a few pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk transitioning to elevated plaza stairs

events.description: exits covered overpass into open urban street with modern buildings visible
lighting shifts from artificial to natural diffused daylight as character exits the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs from street level to the elevated plaza area

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and stepped architecture
textured stone wall with integrated wooden benches and planters
wide stone staircase leading up to the plaza level
tree with yellow-orange autumn foliage at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the overpass into an open area with modern glass architecture. The camera ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by a stone wall with benches on the right. The pavement is wet and reflective, and a pedestrian with an umbrella descends the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with protest encampment and modern sculptures

events.description: reaches top of stairs and continues walking on flat plaza surface
approaching protest camp area with green tents and activist signage becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past modern sculptures and approaching the protest encampment

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow safety vest cleaning near the tents
security guard standing near the yellow billboard

entered.detail: tall digital billboard displaying yellow advertisement with black graphics
angular black metal and glass canopy structure over seating area
green canvas tents forming a protest encampment with banners
white tent structures with activist signage
brutalist concrete residential tower with repetitive window patterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an open paved plaza surrounded by modern glass and concrete architecture. A yellow advertisement billboard stands prominently in the center while green protest tents occupy the far end of the plaza. The ground is wet with puddles reflecting the overcast sky, and autumn trees with orange foliage line the walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered protest encampment with food bank and activist displays

events.description: enters covered area of protest camp passing under green canvas canopies

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered protest encampment area beneath green tents and banners

notable_agents.action: vendor arranging produce at the food bank stall
activist standing near protest banners under the tents

entered.detail: green canvas tent canopy with 'STREETS ARE NOT BEDS' banner overhead
large green banner with white text reading 'STREETS ARE NOT BEDS'
stacked sandbags near the tent entrance
sign reading 'FOOD BANK' on green tent wall
mannequin painted white with protest slogans written on body

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered protest encampment beneath green canvas tents. The ground is littered with debris and cardboard signs. Activist banners including 'STREETS ARE NOT BEDS' and 'LONDON DESERVES BETTER' hang overhead. A food bank stall operates on the right with a vendor arranging produce, while white-painted protest mannequins stand among the tents.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim urban underpass into a rain-slicked public plaza that culminates in a crowded protest encampment. It begins within a covered walkway beneath a highway overpass, moving past pedestrians and passing traffic toward a distant exit. As the character emerges into the open air, the camera ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by benches, where the pavement becomes wet and reflective under a gray sky. The scene then expands across a paved plaza featuring modern glass architecture and orange autumn foliage, passing a prominent yellow billboard before approaching a cluster of green tents. Finally, the camera enters the covered encampment, moving beneath activist banners and past a food bank stall and protest mannequins amidst scattered debris and cardboard signs.
